name: OBI, Microprice, and Momentum Consensus
hypothesis: Requiring simultaneous confirmation from static imbalance (OBI), spread-weighted imbalance (microprice), and short-term price trend (momentum) will create an extremely high-conviction signal that is more robust than any single component.
mutation_note: Implemented 'ensemble_vote' feedback by adding a third confirming signal (microprice_dev_bps > 1.0) to the parent's two-factor model to test for enhanced robustness and precision.
